title: EVgo Q3 2023 Earnings Preview
text: EVgo Q3 2023 earnings preview outlined consensus expectations. The consensus EPS Estimate was -$0.12, showing 36.8% year-over-year improvement. The consensus Revenue Estimate was $29.61 million, representing 182% year-over-year growth. Over the last year prior to Q3 2023, EVgo had beaten EPS estimates 50% of the time and beaten revenue estimates 50% of the time. Actual Q3 2023 results showed strong performance exceeding expectations: Revenue increased to $35.1 million in Q3 2023, compared to $10.5 million in Q3 2022, representing 234% year-over-year growth. Network throughput increased to 37 GWh in Q3 2023, compared to 12 GWh in Q3 2022, representing 208% year-over-year growth. The company's strong beat in Q3 2023 demonstrated continued operational expansion and successful scaling of its network.
